name: CF BANKSHARES INC.
summary: CF Bankshares Inc. is the holding company for CFBank, National Association, a federally chartered national bank. The company operates as a community banking institution offering traditional banking products and services. Based on the filing, CFBank provides financial services including loans and deposit products to customers, operating under the oversight of its Holding Company and Board of Directors.
